sections.name: Kreekoss

link.name: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 53

sources.name: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

sections.text: This creature did not include a description.

link.alt: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 53
link.name: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind pg. 53

sources.name: Pathfinder #170: Spoken on the Song Wind

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Evil
traits.text: Evil effects often manipulate energy from evil-aligned Outer Planes and are antithetical to good divine servants or divine servants of good deities. A creature with this trait is evil in alignment.

traits.name: Beast
traits.text: A creature similar to an animal but with an Intelligence modifier of –3 or higher is usually a beast. Unlike an animal, a beast might be able to speak and reason.

traits.name: Fiend
traits.text: Creatures that hail from or have a strong connection to the evil-aligned planes are called fiends. Fiends can survive the basic environmental effects of planes in the Outer Sphere.

automatic_abilities.name: Evasion
automatic_abilities.text: When Kreekoss rolls a success on a Reflex save, he gets a critical success instead.

traits.name: Agile
traits.text: The multiple attack penalty you take with this weapon on the second attack on your turn is –4 instead of –5, and –8 instead of –10 on the third and subsequent attacks in the turn.

ability.name: Eagle Dive
ability.text: Kreekoss Flies up to double his fly Speed in a straight line, descending at least 10 feet, and then makes a talon Strike.

ability.name: Snatch
ability.text: Kreekoss can Fly at half Speed while he has a creature grabbed or restrained in his talons, carrying that creature along with it.

universal_monster_ability.name: Low-Light Vision
universal_monster_ability.text: The monster can see in dim light as though it were bright light, so it ignores the concealed condition due to dim light.
